name: Chaquetrix (English)
description:
Chaquetrix is similar to Omnitrix but instead of transforming into an alien you summon an anthropomorphic sexy alien girl instead.

Added 2 new aliens: Ripjaws & Ghostfreak. I would add more requested aliens from the comment section so don't be ashamed to give me ideas.

English version of chaquetrix for you horny people 

Please don't be afraid to leave some opinion on the comment section, so that i can make the ai better.
creator: gumball678
